main.description: Remove one recipient wrap from an envelope manifest. This endpoint requires operator authorization. The ciphertext CID remains unchanged and a new rotatable manifest CID is returned. Deleted input manifests are reported as gone when a cleanup tombstone is retained.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the current envelope manifest.

ct_cid.description: Optional expected ciphertext CID. If present, it must match the manifest before the revoke is applied.

recipient.description: Visible-ASCII recipient DID or key id to remove from the new manifest.

ct_cid.description: Stable ciphertext CID referenced by both manifests.

old_manifest_cid.description: CID of the manifest used as the revoke input.

manifest_cid.description: CID of the new envelope manifest after removing the recipient wrap.

recipients.description: Recipient ids still present in the new manifest.
